source: JP Associates, BOO. Initial cost Rs1154cr (March 1996 estimate), CEA cleared at Rs1614.66cr, final ~Rs2847cr. MOU 1992, commissioned Oct 2006.

source: Stage I, commissioned 1984. Initial ~Rs19cr estimate, final Rs79.34cr per Irrigation Dept. Tunnel had face collapse, water ingress, squeezing documented.

source: On Satluj river. Approved recently (2020), under construction.
catchment_source: Derived: total Satluj basin catchment is 51,600 sq km (Himdhara "State of Rivers - Himachal Pradesh" 2017, citing Govt of HP/HIMURJA data); Luhri Stage-1 is downstream of Nathpa Jhakri (49,820 sq km) and Rampur, so catchment must be close to full basin figure. The previously estimated 30,000 sq km is physically inconsistent (catchment cannot decrease moving downstream) and is corrected here.
